Restaurant receipts in Indonesia often don't include customer names. A more helpful recommendation would be to suggest the employee add their name to the receipt documentation or use a supplementary form to record this information.

ISSUE_2_VALIDATION_SCORE: 70 - Similar to issue 1, the recommendation to address the missing invoice number with the supplier isn't fully practical. The receipt does have a receipt number (S0037792), which might be sufficient for tracking purposes. The recommendation should clarify whether the receipt number can serve as an acceptable alternative to an invoice number in this context.

ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 95 - The recommendation regarding personal meals during business trips being subject to gross-up is valid and directly addresses the tax implications.
